sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Mark Hancock sells 500,000 PACS shares (PACS) for $18.9M in June 2026
feed.summary: Mark Hancock, an affiliate of PACS, reported the sale of 500,000 shares of PACS common stock in June 2026 through five separate transactions. These sales generated aggregate proceeds of $18,875,341.54. The filing, a Form 144, serves as a regulatory notice of proposed or recent affiliate sales and does not specify the intended use of proceeds or details regarding a trading plan.

feed.title: OneMedNet (NASDAQ: ONMD) enters $25M standby equity purchase pact
feed.summary: OneMedNet Corporation has entered into a Standby Equity Purchase Agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., allowing it to sell up to $25 million in common stock over 36 months, subject to an effective resale registration statement. The agreement includes conditions such as a 4.99% beneficial ownership limit for Yorkville and a cap on issuances without shareholder approval. This arrangement provides OneMedNet with a flexible source of capital, with actual utilization depending on market conditions and company needs.

feed.title: Processa Pharmaceuticals (PCSA) director buys 2,531 shares in open market
feed.summary: Processa Pharmaceuticals (PCSA) director David Young purchased 2,531 shares of common stock at $1.93 per share in an open-market transaction on June 30, 2026. This acquisition increases his direct holdings to 21,729 shares. Young also reported indirect ownership through several entities.

feed.title: Oscar Health CEO Bertolini sells $35.7 million in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Oscar Health CEO Mark T Bertolini sold approximately $35.7 million worth of company stock through multiple transactions on June 29 and June 30, 2026. These sales, conducted to cover tax withholding obligations from vested performance stock units, involved 1,238,996 shares at weighted average prices between $28.35 and $30.08. Following these transactions, Bertolini retains direct ownership of 7,751,570 shares, while the company's stock has shown significant recent growth and positive analyst upgrades.

feed.title: Bank OZK Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.48 From $0.47 per Share; Payable July 20 to Shareholders of Record on July 13
feed.summary: Bank OZK has announced an increase in its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.48 per share, up from $0.47. This dividend will be payable on July 20, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of July 13, 2026. The announcement reflects the bank's continued practice of raising its dividend.

feed.title: Bank OZK (OZK) Increases Quarterly Dividend for Shareholders
feed.summary: Bank OZK (OZK) has announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend to 48 cents per share, marking its sixty-fourth consecutive quarterly dividend raise. The bank boasts a GF Score™ of 80/100, indicating strong potential for long-term returns, and a P/E ratio of 8.59, suggesting it may be undervalued. While its financial strength is rated as moderate, the consistent dividend growth and favorable GF Score™ point to a solid position for future growth.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Urges NNOX Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in Nano-X Imaging Ltd. to Contact the Firm for Information About Leading the Class Action
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders who invested in Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: NNOX) between March 31, 2025, and April 17, 2026, about a class action lawsuit. The firm is investigating allegations that Nano-X misled investors regarding its manufacturing operations and financial condition, leading to increased operating expenses and a significant stock price drop after reporting Q4 2025 financial results. Shareholders are encouraged to contact Robbins LLP to learn about leading the class action.

feed.title: New Costco approved in California, but some locals say location is 'unnecessary'
feed.summary: A new Costco warehouse and gas station have been approved for Downey, California, creating debate among residents. While city officials laud the project for job creation and revenue generation, some locals question the necessity given existing Costco stores nearby and prefer a Trader Joe's. Others welcome the new location, citing overcrowding at current warehouses.

feed.title: How Apollo’s Removal from Russell Growth Indices Will Impact Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management (APO) has been removed from several Russell Growth indices, including the Russell 1000 and 3000, which will impact index-tracking funds and trading patterns. This reclassification doesn't alter Apollo's core business strategy as an alternative asset manager but highlights how liquidity management and internal execution are critical for its growth in retirement and private credit products. The article also discusses Apollo's investment narrative, fair value estimates, and potential risks and rewards for investors.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Leans Into Digital Leadership As Undervalued Narrative Stays In Focus
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) has reorganized its senior leadership, promoting Carol Juel to head its Digital platform and Florin Arghirescu to Executive Vice President and CTO, focusing on digital leadership. Despite a year-to-date share price decline, the company shows strong long-term shareholder returns and is considered 14% undervalued, driven by its digital and retail partnerships and advanced technology investments. The narrative suggests a fair value of $89.22, but risks like elevated payment rates and dependence on major partners could impact investor confidence.

feed.title: Why Natera (NTRA) Is Up 6.3% After New Signatera Cancer Trial And Japan Launch Milestones
feed.summary: Natera (NTRA) saw its stock rise by 6.3% following significant announcements, including the integration of its Signatera MRD test into a global Phase 3 head and neck cancer trial, expansion of Prospera's role in kidney transplant studies, and PMDA approval for Signatera in colorectal cancer in Japan. These developments are expected to deepen Natera’s involvement in clinical programs and international care guidelines, potentially enhancing the adoption of its oncology and transplant testing platforms. The Japan approval, especially, offers a concrete path to market use in a major colorectal cancer population by late 2026, though investors are also weighing potential risks from rising R&D and legal costs.

feed.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Initiates Phase 2 Study of Crinecerfont in Pediatric Patients Under 4 Years Old with Classic Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences has launched a Phase 2 clinical study for crinecerfont in pediatric patients aged 3 months to under 4 years with classic congenital adrenal hyperplasia (CAH). This study aims to evaluate the safety and tolerability of the drug in this young population, who currently lack approved therapies and are often exposed to high doses of glucocorticoids. The company anticipates these results will support a supplemental New Drug Application to expand Crinecerfont's approved U.S. indication to include patients under 4 years of age, building on its prior FDA approval for patients aged 4 and older.

feed.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) investors approve Class C stock, share increases and new equity plans
feed.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) shareholders have approved several significant changes to the company's charter and equity plans, including the establishment of Class C common stock, a Class C split, and a substantial increase in authorized Class A and preferred shares. These approvals aim to expand the company's capital-raising and acquisition flexibility while ensuring equal treatment across all common stock classes. A new safeguard was also introduced, requiring independent director approval for large acquisitions using Class C stock, and amended equity incentive and employee stock purchase plans were ratified.

feed.title: Apple tracks Safari users, shares data, new class action lawsuit alleges
feed.summary: A new class action lawsuit has been filed against Apple, alleging that its Safari browser secretly tracks users through "canvas fingerprinting" despite the company's privacy claims. The suit, filed by California resident Sarah Simpson, argues that Apple's marketing of Safari as anti-tracking is misleading, as the browser allegedly fails to protect against or report known fingerprinting scripts. The lawsuit claims Apple benefits financially from this tracking through advertising revenue, thereby breaching contracts and engaging in unfair business practices.

feed.title: Nabors Industries Ltd. 2nd Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Invitation
feed.summary: Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) has invited interested parties to join its 2nd Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CDT. Chairman, President and CEO Anthony G. Petrello, and CFO Miguel A. Rodriguez will discuss the operating results, which will be released after the market closes on July 28, 2026. The call will also be available via a live audio webcast on the company's website.

feed.title: Restricted stock dispositions reported for MGNI insider (MGNI)
feed.summary: An insider at Magnite, Inc. (MGNI), David Buonaser, reported multiple dispositions of restricted common stock through Form 144 filings in June 2026. The sales occurred on June 1st, 15th, 16th, and 17th, with the largest single disposition being 11,233 shares for $202,194 on June 16th. These transactions involved restricted stock acquired from the issuer, and while dollar amounts are provided, the Form 144 does not confirm cash flow treatment or if the sales were part of a trading plan.

feed.title: Milestone Scientific expects Q2 revenue of ~$2.8M, up 21% YoY
authors: Naman S ScanX News Team or NULL
feed.summary: Milestone Scientific Inc. anticipates a 21% year-over-year increase in preliminary unaudited Q2 2026 revenue, reaching approximately $2.8 million. This growth is primarily driven by a 300% surge in its medical segment and successful expansion into international markets. The company also reported progress in reimbursement claims, including its first successful workers' compensation claim, and plans to release full financial results in August 2026.

feed.title: Macy's (M) director awarded 1,322 phantom stock units tied to common shares
feed.summary: Macy's, Inc. director MARKEE RICHARD L was granted 1,322 Phantom Stock Units, which are tied to Macy's common stock and will convert on a 1-for-1 basis into common shares upon his departure from the Board. This grant, valued at an average of $20.8064 per unit, represents equity-based compensation rather than an open-market transaction. The units will be settled in stock when the director terminates from the Board of Directors, aligning his long-term incentives with shareholder value.

feed.title: Marcus Theatres records highest June revenue ever
feed.summary: Marcus Theatres achieved its highest June revenue ever, driven by the strong performance of "Toy Story 5" and a robust film slate including "Scary Movie" and "Disclosure Day." The company also reported record concession sales, per-person spending, and its highest June box office since 2019. Anticipating continued success, Marcus Theatres looks forward to upcoming releases like "Minions & Monsters" and "Dune: Part Three."

feed.title: [Form 4] MARCHEX INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Marchex, Inc. reported that Vice Chairman Michael A. Arends acquired $4,144,144 in 6.0% convertible debt due 2028 from the company. This acquisition is tied to Marchex's purchase of Archenia, Inc., where the notes are convertible into Class B common stock and include an earn-out provision for additional shares based on Archenia's performance. The transaction links insider consideration to the acquired business's future financial and operational targets.

feed.title: Lexeo Therapeutics (LXEO) COO reports stock award and small tax-related sale
feed.summary: Lexeo Therapeutics' Chief Operating Officer, Jose Manuel Otero, reported receiving a stock grant of 12,060 shares on June 29 and subsequently selling 4,666 shares on July 1 to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of performance Restricted Stock Units (RSUs). After these transactions, Otero directly holds 137,482 shares, including 100,621 RSUs, indicating the sale was a minor portion of his total holdings. The sale was executed at a weighted average price of $4.48 per share.

feed.title: Viatris Inc. stock rises Wednesday, outperforms market
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. (VTRS) stock rose 1.89% on Wednesday to $16.18, outperforming the broader market which saw the S&P 500 Index fall 0.22% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average fall 0.03%. This rise broke a two-day losing streak for the company's stock.

feed.title: Tatun Tractor Supply Company store to host Deer and wildlife event
feed.summary: The Tatum Tractor Supply Company store is hosting a Deer and Wildlife event on July 18, 2026, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. The event will offer activities such as pet adoption, deer feed education, processing training, and deer plot planting education. It is open to the public and aims to cater to hunting enthusiasts by providing guidance on managing feed plots, herds, and hunter safety.

feed.title: Is Magnite’s (MGNI) In‑Flight Ad Push Quietly Redefining Its Omnichannel Growth Story?
feed.summary: Magnite (MGNI) was recently added to several Russell value benchmarks and announced a partnership with Viasat Aviation to bring programmatic advertising to in-flight Wi-Fi, expanding its omnichannel reach. This move supports Magnite's CTV and video-led narrative by adding a high-attention ad channel, potentially redefining its growth story. However, the company still faces risks related to customer concentration and infrastructure costs, and investors need to consider these factors alongside the new opportunities.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Renews MLB Partnership, Is The Growth Already Priced In?
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International (MGM) has renewed its partnership with Major League Baseball, strengthening its position as the league's exclusive integrated resort and casino partner. Despite soft short-term momentum, the company has seen significant gains over the past 90 days and a year. Valuation models present conflicting views, with one narrative suggesting the stock is overvalued at $47.52 compared to a fair value of $27.97, while another discounted cash flow model indicates it is undervalued relative to a future cash flow value of $64.13.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial (RJF) In Focus On Index Change With Valuation Still In View
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) is drawing investor attention due to its removal from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, an upcoming US$0.54 per share dividend, and a recent analyst price target increase. Despite a modest year-to-date decline, the stock has shown strong longer-term performance with a 5-year total shareholder return of 94.96%. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests RJF is currently undervalued at $158.19, with a fair value estimate of $174.42, driven by strong loan growth and potential increases in net interest income.

feed.title: PDD Holdings Becomes Largest Private Internet Company in Xiongan New Area - News and Statistics
feed.summary: PDD Holdings, the parent company of Pinduoduo and Temu, has become the largest private internet company in the Xiongan New Area, with over 600 employees. This expansion follows the establishment of a new legal entity with 500 million yuan in registered capital and a recruitment drive targeting 5,000 local positions, supporting Xiongan's role in absorbing Beijing's non-essential government functions. The move also comes after previous regulatory issues faced by the e-commerce group.

feed.title: Eastman Kodak files prospectus for 4.426M common shares
feed.summary: Eastman Kodak has filed a prospectus with the SEC for the offering of 4.426 million common shares. These shares are being sold by existing shareholders, meaning Eastman Kodak itself will not receive any proceeds from this sale. The filing provides transparent details about the offering for potential investors.

feed.title: Kilroy Realty schedules July 28 call after Q2 results on July 27
feed.summary: Kilroy Realty Corporation (KRC) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Monday, July 27, 2026. The company will then host a conference call to discuss these results on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. Registration details for participation and a link to the live internet broadcast and replay are available through the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Is TE Connectivity’s AI and Electrification Order Surge Altering The Investment Case For TEL?
feed.summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) is experiencing record orders driven by AI infrastructure and electrification, as evidenced by its fiscal second-quarter results with $5.30 billion in orders and 15% sales growth. The upcoming fiscal third-quarter earnings report on July 22 will be crucial for investors to assess if this strong demand continues or if rising costs and margin pressures begin to impact the company's performance. Despite these potential challenges, analysts project TE Connectivity to reach $23.5 billion in revenue and $4.1 billion in earnings by 2029, suggesting a significant upside to its current price.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Draws Fresh Attention Following Index Adds And AI Push
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) is gaining investor attention after being added to three Russell 1000 defensive indices, introducing new AI-focused product updates, and expanding its cloud data partnership with CGI Inc. Despite a recent share price decline, the company has seen significant returns over the past year, with market narratives suggesting it is 8.9% undervalued due to accelerating AI and hybrid cloud demand. Investors are now evaluating if further growth potential remains, considering its current valuation relative to analyst and intrinsic value estimates.

feed.title: Apple (AAPL) Negotiates Chip Purchases from Blacklisted Chinese Manufacturers
feed.summary: Apple (AAPL) is reportedly in negotiations to purchase chips from U.S. blacklisted Chinese manufacturers, Changxin Memory Technologies and Yangtze Memory Technologies, to address global memory chip shortages, particularly for the Chinese market. This move highlights the complexities of global supply chains and the delicate balance between operational needs and regulatory compliance. Despite Apple's strong profitability and growth, the stock is considered about 10.4% overvalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value, with a P/E ratio higher than its 5-year median, and significant insider selling has been reported.

feed.title: IMS Group to Appoint John M. Caccia as Chairman and Partner
feed.summary: IMS Group and its investment management division, IMS Capital Management (IMS CM), announced the appointment of John M. Caccia, Esq. as Chairman, effective July 1, 2026. Mr. Caccia, formerly a senior partner at Skadden, will work from IMS Group's New York office and focus on expanding global activities and capital management, particularly in private equity, private credit, and digital assets. The move is expected to strengthen IMS Group's reach in U.S. markets and leverage its tech, venture, and AI advantages for its transaction pipeline.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Draws Fresh Attention Following Index Adds And AI Push

Despite a recent share price decline, the company has shown significant returns over the past year, with a narrative suggesting it is 8.9% undervalued driven by AI and hybrid cloud demand.
